evidence: From LEP_SP_307_24-NTT-APPC-T2: "Pre-appointment BIM Execution Plan in accordance with the CIC BIM Standards Version 2.1 (or later version at the original tender closing date or, if this has been extended, the extended date), including clear description of the approach for the following: (i) Creation of as-built BIM model of the Facility, including verification records; (ii) Using BIM model of the Existing Facility for the Design and construction of the Works"; From EP_SP_307-24-Tender_Documents_Volume_3a_v2: "30.4.1.1 Further to Section 30.2.3.1 of this Specification and in accordance with Sections 31.8.11 and 33.4.19 of this Specification, the Contractor shall Design, implement, and produce a BIM model for the Existing Facility, including the requirements set out in Appendix V of this Specification."; From EP_SP_307-24-Tender_Documents_Volume_3b_v3: "33.4.19.1 Building Information Modelling (BIM) shall meet the following performance requirements, without limitation: (a) to meet the specified requirements and standards set out in Appendix V of this Specification; and (b) to meet the specified requirements set out in the Building Information Modelling (BIM) Guide for Facilities Upkeep (Version 3.1)"; From EP_SP_307-24-Tender_Documents_Volume_3b_v3: "2.4 The Contractor shall follow the information management guidelines set out in the CIC BIM Standard V2.1, this document covers the Hong Kong specific requirements to adopting the ISO 19650 series of standards."; From EP_SP_307-24-Tender_Documents_Volume_3b_v3: "The mandatory BIM Standards and Guidelines to be adopted in the project shall include the following: 1. CIC BIM Standards General (August 2019); (Version 2 December 2020) and (Version 2.1 2021), by the CIC."
reasoning: The analyst identifies a critical requirement to synchronize the technical BIM specifications found in the project Scope (Volumes 3a and 3b) with the evaluation benchmarks established in the Volume 1 marking scheme. This alignment check ensures that the 'Pre-appointment BIM Execution Plan' required for tender assessment and the eventual technical delivery meet the same standard, specifically the CIC BIM Standards Version 2.1. Furthermore, the analysis points toward a necessary cross-check with NEC4 Option X10 (Information Modelling) in the Contract Data to ensure that the legal framework for digital data management, technical requirements in Appendix V, and facilities management standards (BIM Guide for Facilities Upkeep V3.1) are consistent across the entire contract lifecycle.
description: Verify that the BIM technical requirements in Volume 3a/3b align with the CIC BIM Standards referenced in Volume 1 and the Option X10 (Information Modelling) clauses in the Contract Data.
manual_verdict_note: The original tender documents explicitly reference CIC BIM Standards Version 2.1 and local facilities upkeep guides across Volumes 1, 3a, and 3b, providing a consistent technical basis for the analyst's verification requirement.
